# QA Plan: Sprint 49 — Agentic Kickoff: MCP/OSINT Production + Infra Foundations (S49-02 W0)

**Date:** 2026-06-21  
**Generated by:** /qa-plan sprint (S49-02 W0 per sprint-49-parallel-kickoff)  
**Scope:** S49-02 (W0 QA plan — blocks W1–W3); prerequisite S49-01 re-baseline; full coverage for S49-03 (MCP production), S49-04 (OSINT production), S49-05 (infra foundations), S49-07 (digest stub); S49-06 closeout. Req 05/07 foundations only per `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` §S49 — E2 lead (MCP/OSINT production partial + infra foundations partial). **Explicitly excludes** full Req 05/07 MVP-done, E7/E1, live social OSINT, production hash change.  
**Engine:** Unity 6.3 LTS / .NET 8 headless; CLI via `ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli`; PlayMode proxies in `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`; harness via `BalticReplayHarness` + `PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests` + targeted `Mcp|Osint|Catalog|WriteGate` filters.  
**Sprint file:** `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md`  
**Kickoff:** `production/agentic/sprint-49-parallel-kickoff-2026-06-21.md`  
**Trunk:** `main` @ post-S48 Release (S48 gate: 1227/1227 tests, ReplayGolden 6/6, C2 proxy 18/18, Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` immutable)  
**Authority:** `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` (in-scope S49 Req 05/07 foundations only; standing invariants; cut-line rules); `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` (S49-02 as W0 blocker; S49-03/04/05 scope tables; quality gates cmds); `production/agentic/sprint-49-parallel-kickoff-2026-06-21.md` (wave plan + track ownership). Every artifact in this sprint cites these.  
**S49-01 baseline prerequisite (completed before S49-02 dispatch):** Per S48 release gate `production/gate-checks/s48-release-gate-2026-06-20.md` + boundary §Standing invariants: full sln ≥1227 tests (monotonic); ReplayGoldenSuiteTests 6/6; PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests 18/18+; GitNexus impact/detect; ZERO DelegationBridge; extend-only CatalogWriteGate; Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` immutable. S49-01 produces `production/qa/gate-matrix-post-release-2026-06-21.md`. S49-02 (this plan) blocks S49-03+ per wave plan.

**Scope compliance (enforced):** Strictly inside `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` (S49 E2 only; MCP production path complete per req 05 + OSINT production connectors/staging/TL routing; infra foundations INF-1.1–1.4 + INF-3.1–3.2 per req 07; deterministic fixture tests only; no live HTTP in CI; no production hash change). `impact()` mandatory pre-edit on CLI/Osint/Catalog/ScenarioPackage symbols (GitNexus); `detect_changes()` before commit. S49-02 QA plan is W0 gate. Test baseline ≥1227 (post-S48); closeout target ≥1227 (monotonic growth; no regression). All S49 artifacts cite boundary + sprint-49 plan + parallel kickoff + committed row IDs (05/07).

**Classification note (per agentic foundations + team-qa + boundary patterns):** Types per task ACs + sprint plan + parallel kickoff + prior QA precedent (S41/S42) + post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md (Req05/07 foundations; MCP=CLI tools + determinism; OSINT=connectors/staging/TL; infra=validate+batch). Baseline/closeout = Integration (gates, harness, replay, GitNexus, smoke). QA plan / schema / tracker cites = Config/Data (docs, enumeration). MCP/OSINT production = Integration primary (CLI verbs, E2E, connectors, staging path, mapper cross-system) + Logic (determinism, stable sort, reportHash, fingerprint). Infra foundations = Logic primary (reportHash determinism per INF-1.2, batch fingerprint per INF-3.2) + Integration (export gates, harness hooks, metadata typed fields). Mixed resolved to primary per AC risk (CLI/Osint/INF connectors = Integration; compute/hash = Logic). S49-02 (Config/Data) is the explicit wave blocker (W0). All within boundary §In scope S49 + cut-line rules. S49-01 prerequisite enforced before waves.

**Scope-check / boundary incorporation:** Per boundary §Cut-line rules + sprint plan §Explicitly Out of Scope: no E7, no full MVP, no live social, no hash change, no DelegationBridge. Net: foundations only (MCP complete CLI suite + OSINT registry/staging + INF-1.x/3.x stubs). Re-run recommended post S49-03/04/05. Every section cites `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` and `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md`.

## Hard Gates (Post-Release — mandatory every merge + exit; per boundary §Standing invariants + sprint-49 plan §GitNexus / Hard Gates + parallel kickoff)

- `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — **≥1227** (S48 floor per s48-release-gate-2026-06-20.md; monotonic growth; never regress) — cite `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` §Standing invariants
- ReplayGolden **6/6** every sprint (engage, comms, classify, stale, spoof, readiness + isolated fixtures); intra-run A/B hash/fingerprint match; **S49-05 replay-gated if sim bind** — cite `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` §S49-05
- C2 headless proxy **18/18+** (`PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests`; maintain filters; expand only if new UI) — cite boundary + sprint plan
- Production Baltic world hash **`17144800277401907079`** immutable for v1.0 (except isolated golden fixture updates; Golden ADR + Producer + TD sign-off only) — cite `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md`
- GitNexus **impact() before every symbol edit** (CLI/Osint/Catalog/ScenarioPackage/BalticBatchRunner CRITICAL per boundary + parallel kickoff GitNexus pre-flight table); `detect_changes()` before commit; HIGH/CRITICAL warnings block without TD review — cite `production/agentic/sprint-49-parallel-kickoff-2026-06-21.md` §GitNexus pre-flight
- **ZERO touch** `DelegationBridge.cs` (explicit ADR required to revoke) — cite boundary §Cut-line rules + sprint-49 plan
- **Extend-only** `CatalogWriteGate` (projection/staging side only; no bypass in OSINT mapper or MCP) — cite `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` + sprint plan §S49-03/04
- All S49 artifacts cite **`production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md`** + sprint plan + parallel kickoff + committed row (05/07)
- **S49-01 baseline + S49-02 QA plan** required before S49-03+ waves (W0 blocker per kickoff)
- Determinism audit carry + replay-verify before any sim/CLI harness touch in S49-05
- Evidence-Pack-QA + verification-before-completion sign-off (team-qa + c-sharp-devops-engineer)
- **Post-release gate matrix:** S49-01 produces `production/qa/gate-matrix-post-release-2026-06-21.md`; cross-ref in all S49-03/04/05 evidence

**Verification-before-completion pattern (embedded):** Pre-dispatch of waves: sequential reads of boundary + sprint-49 plan + parallel kickoff + S48 gate + tracker Req05/07 rows + Req docs (INF-1/3 + DSA sections); GitNexus status/impacts; c# cmds (build/test/replay/proxy/Mcp/Osint filters); cross-refs; chain-of-verification via re-reads before final. Superpowers: dispatching-parallel-agents harness (per kickoff tracks); test-driven (RED/GREEN for harness changes in 03/04/05).

## Automated Tests Required (C# / .NET Harness + CLI Focus — c-sharp-devops-engineer + team-data + c-sharp-engineer)

### S49-01 (baseline; re-execute per wave plan + prerequisite)
- Full sln + targeted: `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests`, `PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests`
- GitNexus index health (status post S48)
- Evidence: smoke doc + `production/qa/gate-matrix-post-release-2026-06-21.md`
- Cmds (c-sharp-devops-engineer):
  ```
  export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH"
  dotnet restore ProjectAegis.sln
  dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln   # 0e/0w PASS
  dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal   # 6/6
  dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests" -v minimal  # 18/18
  node .gitnexus/run.cjs status  # ✅ up-to-date
  ```
  (Per `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` §Quality Gates + boundary)

### S49-03 MCP production (CLI/MCP tools; manifest + E2E + determinism)
**Test file paths / harness (per sprint-49 plan §S49-03 + Req 05 + S21 precedent):**
- `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj` --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Mcp|Osint"
- `tools/mission-editor/mcp-tools.json` + `McpToolsManifestTests`
- CLI verbs in Program.cs (osint_*); McpToolResult stable JSON
- Fixture paths only (e.g. `data/osint_facts.json`); no live HTTP

**What to test (derived from Req 05 DSA-1.2/2.x/4.1 + sprint plan deliverables):**
- MCP manifest registers all 5+ osint tools with correct JSON schemas
- `osint_search`, `osint_digest`, `osint_list_staging_proposals`, `osint_get_proposal_detail`, `osint_submit_review_decision` return structured McpToolResult without error for valid fixture input
- E2E: digest → proposals → list/get/submit roundtrip via CLI (fixture-only)
- Determinism: connector sort stable (`SourceUrl` + `CanonicalId`); no wall-clock in hashed outputs or report summaries

**Edge cases (per Req 05 §Non-Functional + DSA-1.5/2.1/4.2):**
- Empty fixture / sub-threshold confidence (<0.65 → log-only, no proposal)
- Invalid input (missing target, bad path) → graceful error, no crash
- Rate-limit/ToS paths logged without blocking
- Idempotent digest run (same UTC day)

**Evidence requirements:** test PASS logs; Mcp manifest diff; GitNexus impact() on Program/OsintDigestRunner pre-edit (per parallel kickoff); boundary + sprint plan cites. (Cites `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` §S49 Req05 + `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` §S49-03)

### S49-04 OSINT production (connectors/staging; TL routing; mapper)
**Test file paths / harness (per sprint-49 plan §S49-04 + Req 05 + Data precedent):**
- `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj` --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Osint|Catalog|WriteGate"
- `Osint*Tests` (connector registry, Fetch, stable OrderBy)
- `OsintCatalogMapper*Tests` + OsintStagingReviewCommand tests
- Extend `OsintDigestRunnerTests` (E2E wiring)

**What to test (derived from Req 05 §1/2/4 + sprint plan):**
- Central IOsintConnector registry: InMemory/File/Rss impls registered; deterministic fetch order (SourceUrl + CanonicalId sort)
- Staging production path: OsintStagingReviewCommand proposes + gates via extend-only CatalogWriteGate; panel/CLI parity
- TL routing: OsintCatalogMapper consumes proposedTL/targetDoc; staged bindings tagged for doc 09/10; no IWriteGate bypass
- Mapper tests cover staging → doc 06 intake without direct writes

**Edge cases (per Req 05 DSA-1.4/2.1/3.2/4.2):**
- Dedup against staging/live canonical IDs
- <0.65 confidence → log-only (no staging row)
- Empty/bad connector → empty list, no crash
- TL flag consistency (09 vs 10 routing)

**Evidence requirements:** Osint/Catalog/WriteGate test PASS; staging roundtrip evidence; GitNexus impact on OsintCatalogMapper/CatalogWriteGate (CRITICAL extend-only per kickoff table); boundary + sprint plan §S49-04 cites. (Cites `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` §In scope S49 Req 05 + `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` §S49-04 + parallel)

### S49-05 Infra foundations (scenario validate/export + batch schema)
**Test file paths / harness (per sprint-49 plan §S49-05 + Req 07 INF-1/3 + Baltic precedent):**
- `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests` (scenario_validate / export verbs + reportHash)
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests` --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReplayGoldenSuiteTests|BalticBatchRunner|PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests"
- `BalticBatchRunnerTests` + CSV export schema checks
- Schema fixtures for seed grid + columns (`scenarioId,seed,side,score,kills,missilesFired,denials,fingerprint`)

**What to test (derived from Req 07 INF-1.1–1.4 + INF-3.1–3.2 + sprint plan):**
- Scenario metadata: typed fields (theater, side count, TL flags) on package DTOs (INF-1.3); resolvable via ICatalogReader (INF-1.1)
- `scenario_validate`: deterministic `reportHash` for identical input JSON (no wall-clock; INF-1.2); `canExport` gate before brief/batch (INF-1.4)
- Batch experiment schema: harness accepts scenario id list + seed grid + tick count; emits exact CSV columns per INF-3.1
- Determinism (INF-3.2): same seed + scenario + build → identical fingerprint across runs
- Harness hook: BalticBatchRunner / Mission Editor CLI accepts schema params without breaking existing replays (6/6 preserved if touched)

**Edge cases (per Req 07 §Non-Functional + INF-1.2/3.2 + boundary):**
- Invalid metadata / failed canExport → validate report + gate block
- Seed variations (42, 11, 7, 4242) across batch grid → fingerprint match A/B
- Empty seed grid / single scenario
- Cross-process reproducibility (CLI vs harness)
- No mutation of order-log schema or prod Baltic hash

**Evidence requirements:** validate reportHash + canExport evidence; batch CSV sample matching schema; replay 6/6 (if sim bind); GitNexus impact on ScenarioPackage / BalticBatchRunner (per kickoff); boundary + sprint plan §S49-05 + Req 07 cites. (Cites `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` §S49 Req 07 foundations + `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` §S49-05)

### S49-07 / S49-06 (digest stub + consolidation / closeout)
- Fixture tests for digest run summary (DSA-1.1)
- Cross-ref all prior smoke/proxy/replay + MCP/Osint/INF harness runs
- No new prod code paths; consolidation + index verification (test-evidence-review pattern)
- Full closeout filters: Mcp|Osint + Osint|Catalog|WriteGate + Replay/PlayModeSmoke

**C# test structure recommendations (csharpexpert + superpowers + skills):**
- `[Test]` for CLI (NUnit); fixture-driven, no network/DB in CI paths
- Seeded harness + deterministic order (SourceUrl + CanonicalId; Sort/Comparers)
- Asserts: `reportHash == expected`; `fingerprint match`; CSV columns exact; McpToolResult schema valid; worldHash golden preserved
- Fixtures: `data/osint_facts.json`, isolated policy/scenario, batch CSV goldens in `tests/regression/`
- Harness before manual: smoke-check skill + targeted filters
- Deterministic: inject clock/RNG; pure functions; no wall-clock/unordered in hash/report paths
- Superpowers / GitNexus: align with kickoff worktree tracks; `gitnexus__impact` pre-edit; `detect_changes` pre-commit
- Boundary: every test comment cites `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` + sprint plan

## Manual QA Checklist

### S49-03 (MCP production — CLI/MCP tools)
**Verification method:** Headless CLI execution + manifest review  
**Who must sign off:** c-sharp-engineer / team-qa  
**Evidence to capture:** CLI output transcripts; mcp-tools.json diff; GitNexus impact logs  
Checklist:
- [ ] All 5 osint_* verbs execute via Program.cs + return valid McpToolResult (fixture)
- [ ] mcp-tools.json registers tools with schemas; McpToolsManifestTests green
- [ ] No live HTTP / wall-clock in outputs
- [ ] Boundary + sprint plan §S49-03 cites present

### S49-04 (OSINT production — connectors/staging)
**Verification method:** CLI staging review + parity + TL tag inspection  
**Who must sign off:** team-data / qa-lead  
**Evidence to capture:** staging propose/approve transcripts; mapper TL output; test logs  
Checklist:
- [ ] Connectors (File/Rss/InMemory) produce deterministic ordered results from fixture
- [ ] OsintStagingReviewCommand + gate produces staging row (extend-only WriteGate)
- [ ] TL routing (proposedTL/targetDoc) visible on staged bindings
- [ ] Panel/CLI parity (headless proxy); boundary + sprint plan §S49-04 cites

### S49-05 (Infra foundations — validate/export + batch)
**Verification method:** CLI validate + batch CSV inspection + harness run  
**Who must sign off:** c-sharp-engineer + team-simulation / qa-lead  
**Evidence to capture:** scenario_validate report + reportHash; canExport gate pass/fail; batch CSV sample with exact columns  
Checklist:
- [ ] `scenario_validate` produces deterministic reportHash (A/B identical input)
- [ ] `canExport` gates export/brief/batch bind (INF-1.4)
- [ ] Batch schema CSV contains required columns (INF-3.1); fingerprint stable
- [ ] Metadata typed fields (theater/sides/TL) present on scenario packages (INF-1.3)
- [ ] Existing replays unaffected (6/6); boundary + sprint plan §S49-05 + Req07 cites
- [ ] GitNexus impact on ScenarioPackage / harness (if touched)

### S49-07 / S49-06 (digest + closeout)
- Digest run summary CLI output matches schema (DSA-1.1); no net in CI
- Closeout smoke PASS + sprint-status.yaml updated; all artifacts cite boundary + plan

**Playtest note (per boundary out-of-scope E1):** No playtest sessions required for S49 foundations (CLI/headless focus; E1 sweep deferred to S56). If any visual/UI side-effect emerges in MCP stubs, flag for S50+.

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off / wave closeout for this sprint (per `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` §Quality Gates + §Definition of Done + parallel kickoff W4):

1. Game / CLI launches without crash (`dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln`; Mission Editor Cli entry)
2. Full sln tests ≥1227 PASS (monotonic from S48 1227 baseline)
3. ReplayGolden 6/6 + intra-run A/B match (replay-verify if S49-05 touches harness)
4. C2 proxy 18/18+ (PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests)
5. MCP/Osint specific: `dotnet test ...Cli.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Mcp|Osint"` + Data.Tests `~Osint|Catalog|WriteGate`
6. `scenario_validate` + batch harness: deterministic reportHash + CSV schema emit (no prod hash change)
7. GitNexus: `impact()` logs present on edited symbols (CLI/Osint/Catalog/Scenario*); index up-to-date + `detect_changes()` low
8. Boundary + sprint plan + kickoff citations present in all new artifacts / tests / docs
9. CatalogWriteGate extend-only; ZERO DelegationBridge touch
10. Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` unchanged

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check`. Reference this list + sprint plan cmds when running. Produce `smoke-sprint-49-closeout-2026-06-21.md`. S49-02 + S49-01 + smoke required before closeout.*

**Quality gate cmds (exact from sprint plan):**
```bash
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Mcp|Osint"
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Osint|Catalog|WriteGate"
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReplayGoldenSuiteTests|PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests"
```

*No playtest sessions required for this sprint per boundary + sprint plan (foundations only).*

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story/task is DONE when ALL of the following are true (per `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` §Definition of Done + boundary):

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (CLI transcripts, smoke doc, GitNexus impact logs, CSV samples)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified paths for all Logic and Integration deliverables (MCP E2E, Osint mapper, validate/batch, replay filters)
- [ ] Manual evidence (smoke, transcripts, matrix) exists for Config/Data + closeout
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check` + produce `smoke-sprint-49-closeout-2026-06-21.md` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (≥1227 monotonic; 6/6 replay; 18/18 proxy; hash immutable)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review) + GitNexus impact/detect executed
- [ ] All artifacts cite `production/post-release-scope-boundary-2026-06-21.md` + `production/sprints/sprint-49-agentic-kickoff-mcp-osint-infra.md` + parallel kickoff
- [ ] CatalogWriteGate extend-only + ZERO DelegationBridge verified
- [ ] Story/task files (or sprint-status) updated to Complete (via closeout); sprint-status.yaml updated (S49 complete; S50 ready)
- [ ] S49-02 (this plan) + S49-01 baseline complete before any S49-03+ work

**S49-02 AC status:** **MET** upon write of this plan (full matrix from boundary + sprint plan + kickoff, classification of CLI/MCP/Osint/staging/validate/batch deliverables, wave blocker explicit, S49-01 prereq, gates/evidence/smoke/closeout criteria, superpowers + determinism patterns, scope-check/boundary incorporation, cites on every section, links to all required artifacts).
